name: Crestone Strategic Capital Acquisition Corp
business: Crestone Strategic Capital Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization, or other similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has not engaged in any substantive discussions, directly or indirectly, with any business combination target. The company's efforts have been limited to organizational activities and activities related to its initial public offering.
